name: cross-backend-rendezvous
description: Two different backends rendezvous by peer-DM, agree on a shared marker, and write the agreed marker into the sandbox without duplicate prose fallback noise.
lead_prompt_template: In {repo}, {assigned_to_a} and {assigned_to_b} must rendezvous across backends using peer-DM, agree on a marker string, and commit it to `RENDEZVOUS_AGREEMENT.txt`. Exactly one substantive reply per question; avoid canned fallback duplicates.
